GLUCARGO.Settings.PlayerVisible.Name: Show Cargo Grid to players
GLUCARGO.Settings.PlayerVisible.Hint: When disabled, players do not see the Cargo Grid button and any open player board closes.
GLUCARGO.Settings.MaxShapeSize.Name: Maximum cargo shape editor size
GLUCARGO.Settings.MaxShapeSize.Hint: Maximum width and height for custom cargo masks.
GLUCARGO.Settings.CellSize.Name: Cargo grid cell size
GLUCARGO.Settings.CellSize.Hint: Default grid cell size in pixels before the board scales down to fit.
GLUCARGO.Title: Cargo Grid
